construct: Demonstrates understanding of the interconnections between God and spirituality, humanity and the environment by interpreting religious teachings and practices and applies them to real life situations

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates understanding of growth, friendship and family as basis for human existence

subSkills.label: Demonstrates personal development and self-improvement; appreciates supportive relationships and trust; demonstrates family bonds, love and belonging
topicAliases: Religious teaching on friendship and love
Religious teachings on courtship and marriage

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates understanding of spirituality, faith and prayer as commitment to God

subSkills.label: Appreciates spirituality, faith and prayer as sources of strength, guidance and comfort
topicAliases: Religious teachings on faith and prayer

elementsOfConstruct.description: Applies national values and principles in the community

subSkills.label: Comprehends and applies values and principles for the benefit of oneself and the community
topicAliases: Religious teachings on Justice in society

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates understanding of man's attitude to Life and work

subSkills.label: Demonstrates positive attitudes to life and work
topicAliases: Religious teachings on wealth and happiness

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates understanding of order, leadership and freedom in society

subSkills.label: Appreciates and applies order, leadership, integrity and freedom in society
topicAliases: Religious teachings on leadership and integrity

components.structureNotes: SBA Form 2: 5 tasks/100 (20 per EoC). All 5 EoC. Assignments, discussions, quizzes, projects.
5 sections A-E (one per EoC), 2 items each (20 marks); answer 1 per section (5 answered = 100). Duration 2h30. 70%.

rules: Examiner coordination meeting before marking to harmonise scoring guide/rubric.
Continuous checking during scoring to maintain standards.
Final Exam items are scenario-based (20 marks each); candidates answer one item per EoC section.
SBA and Final Exam both required for grading.

exemplars.scenarioTheme: Faith and prayer as sources of strength in a real-life Zambia community challenge (RE Final Exam style)
